paragraphs: Oru 23 varshathuku munnadi indha naal dhaan vandhiyaam, ana enna life kulla vara unakku ivlo naal aayiruku. Sila per-ah dhaan life la munnadiye paathirukalamo nu thonum; neeyum adhu maari oru aalu.
You are literally one of my favorite person in the world.

I am very thankful for my one and only paithiyam for bringing you into my life, where you have become a part. Evlo dhoorathula irundhum ivlo strong-ah oru bond create panna mudiyum nu enaku perusa thonunadhu illa, aana ipo dhaan puriyudhu — oru aalu life la vara neram, kaalam, kaaranam, dhooram nu edhuvum mukkiyam illa nu.
Evlo seekram ennala mudiyumo, avlo seekram andha dhooratha korachitu unna vandhu paakuren.
Manasukulla thitture nu theriyudhu -" idhu oru kaaranam, idhuku nee edhuku pone?" nu puriyudhuuu. Aana vandhutee, what to do? 😌
And we are a perfect trio, where I always end up getting bullied by you two. But that's what I love about us.
And this is your special day, and the promise is, I will always be there for you, no matter what.
